scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && node index.js" "cd client && set BROWSER=none&& react-scripts start"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.render-build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
